upcoming_deadlines: Cardiff postdoc (Tier 1): 25 March 2026 - 23 days remaining. PRIORITY.
LSE research fellow: 30 April 2026 - 59 days remaining.
MSCA-PF 2026 call: September 2026 - start preparing proposal now.
strategy_recommendations: Prioritise Cardiff application immediately - direct connection via Prof Huggins is a rare advantage. Prepare research statement linking SimJogja to Welsh regional economics by mid-March.
Begin MSCA-PF proposal outline now - even though deadline is Sep 2026, strong proposals take 3-4 months to prepare. Utrecht or Cardiff could be host institutions.
Contact Groningen MSc supervisor for recommendation letters - useful for both Groningen lectureship and other Dutch opportunities.
Prepare a 'core application package': updated CV, 2-page research statement, teaching statement, and 3 reference letters. Reusable across all applications.
Monitor NWO Veni grant call (expected May 2026) - Dutch MSc makes you eligible for this prestigious early-career grant.
grant_cycles: MSCA Postdoctoral Fellowships: Annual call usually opens April, deadline September. Start preparing now.
NWO Veni: Expected call May 2026, deadline typically October. Dutch MSc provides eligibility.
British Academy Postdoctoral Fellowships: Usually advertised October-November for April start.
ESRC Postdoctoral Fellowships: Rolling, but most advertised Sep-Nov.
Italian PRIN/PNRR calls: Irregular, monitor EURAXESS Italy.
emerging_opportunities: EU Cohesion Policy evaluation positions expected as 2021-2027 programming period enters final phase - strong fit for spatial microsimulation skills.
UK Levelling Up Fund creating demand for regional economists in Welsh universities - Cardiff likely to advertise more positions.
OECD Regional Development Division occasionally recruits - monitor OECD careers portal.
World Bank spatial analysis team expanding - relevant for Indonesia/development angle.
cv_gaps_to_address: Publication record: Submit at least one paper before October 2026 to strengthen applications.
Teaching experience: Limited formal teaching - consider offering a guest lecture at PoliMi to add to CV.
Grant writing: No independent grant applications yet - MSCA-PF would be first, which is typical for early career.
International collaboration: Research visit to Cardiff (Aug-Jan) provides this, ensure it is highlighted.
